goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'the nirala'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'price range'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'norwich'.
The train should 'arrive by 16:45' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called the nirala
Make sure you get phone number and price range
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to norwich
The train should arrive by 16:45 and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get travel time and price
